entity.summary: Ink-based automated-market-maker decentralized exchange for divisible inscription assets and general token liquidity, with a current first-party trading application and independently tracked on-chain liquidity.
entity.notes: HEI treats InkSwap as distinct from InkySwap. The first-party JavaScript application remains reachable, while DefiLlama reports current Ink-chain TVL. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: InkSwap official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party JavaScript application endpoint identifies and serves the InkSwap exchange surface.

evidence.title: InkSwap protocol profile and TVL
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile classifies InkSwap as an Ink AMM DEX and reports non-zero current TVL, supporting active classification.
